task_completion.description: Verify that a new Customer Shipment document has been created or opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active window or tab in the iDempiere interface is 'Customer Shipment' or 'Shipment (Customer)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Business Partner is set to 'C&W Construction'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Business Partner' or 'BPartner' field in the shipment header displays 'C&W Construction'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first shipment line is added for 'Azalea Bush' with a quantity of 25.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Shipment Line tab or grid, there is a record showing the Product as 'Azalea Bush' and the Movement Quantity as '25'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second shipment line is added for 'Elm Tree' with a quantity of 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Shipment Line tab or grid, there is a record showing the Product as 'Elm Tree' and the Movement Quantity as '10'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Customer Shipment document has been completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Document Status field shows 'Completed' (or 'CO'), or a status message indicates the document was successfully completed and the fields are now read-only.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere GUI to create the shipment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the iDempiere web interface (menus, windows, tabs) rather than a terminal window executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface elements (dropdowns, tabs, buttons, grids) belong to the genuine iDempiere ERP system, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is operating within the correct client environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The top navigation or status bar indicates the user is logged into the 'GardenWorld' client.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Business Partner: 'C&W Construction'. Line 1: Product 'Azalea Bush', Quantity 25. Line 2: Product 'Elm Tree', Quantity 10. Document Status: 'CO' (Completed). Client Name: 'GardenWorld'.
